description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large head, pink twin-tailed hair, and golden hair ornaments. The doll has wide, expressive eyes with detailed irises and a neutral facial expression. It is dressed in a classic black and white maid outfit, featuring a frilled apron, white collar, and cuffs, with a pink bow at the neckline. The dress has a scalloped hem and is paired with black shoes and white socks. The arms are slightly bent at the elbows, and the hands are shaped simply without individual fingers. The overall appearance is smooth and cartoon-like, with a matte finish and minimal surface texture.
description: A stylized doll with pink twin-tailed hair, golden ornaments, and a black-and-white maid dress with a pink bow, featuring a smooth, cartoon-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pink twin-tails, golden hair ornaments, detailed maid dress, and black shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the length and layering of the hair, and the side silhouette of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with twin-tails, golden ornaments, and the back of the dress and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, hair, and the side of the dress and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic French maid outfit with a black dress, white frilled apron, white collar and cuffs, and a pink bow at the neckline, paired with black shoes and white socks.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight; head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide-open eyes, relaxed mouth, and slightly arched eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight pink hair styled in twin-tails with golden hair ornaments.
